languages.text: "Фиксирую святотатственное вмешательство профанов в ритуал обслуживания даров Омниссии. Настаиваю на профилактической сервиторизации лиц, ответственных за хранение арсенала".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] "Ты че, пес, о прогрессе задумался?! А ну, мысли на бордюр!"
"Фиксирую святотатственное вмешательство профанов в ритуал обслуживания даров Омниссии. Настаиваю на профилактической сервиторизации лиц, ответственных за хранение арсенала".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую святотатственное вмешательство профанов в ритуал обслуживания даров Омниссии. Настаиваю на профилактической сервиторизации лиц, ответственных за хранение арсенала".

traits.locale_text: "I register a sacrilegious intervention by profane hands into the rite of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah. I insist upon the prophylactic servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

"I register a sacrilegious intervention by profane hands into the rite of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah. I insist upon the prophylactic servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

"I register these laypeople's sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

"I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

languages.text: «Registro una interferencia sacrílega en el rito de cuidado de los dones del Omnissiah por parte del personal laico. Insisto en una servidorización cautelar de los responsables del mantenimiento del arsenal».
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: «Registro una interferencia sacrílega en el rito de cuidado de los dones del Omnissiah por parte del personal laico. Insisto en una servidorización cautelar de los responsables del mantenimiento del arsenal».

languages.text: “我正在记录这些教外人士对侍奉欧姆尼赛亚之赐的圣礼所进行的亵渎干预。我坚持要求对那些负责此军械库维护的人员进行惩戒性的机仆化改造。”
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: “我正在记录这些教外人士对侍奉欧姆尼赛亚之赐的圣礼所进行的亵渎干预。我坚持要求对那些负责此军械库维护的人员进行惩戒性的机仆化改造。”

languages.text: « Je note une ingérence sacrilège des profanes dans les rites d'entretien des dons de l'Omnimessie. J'insiste sur la nécessité d'une servitorisation préventive des responsables de l'entretien de l'arsenal. »
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: « Je note une ingérence sacrilège des profanes dans les rites d'entretien des dons de l'Omnimessie. J'insiste sur la nécessité d'une servitorisation préventive des responsables de l'entretien de l'arsenal. »

languages.text: "Avamın, Hermesih'in armağanlarına hizmet etme ayinlerine saygısız müdahalelerde bulunduklarını kaydediyorum. Cephaneliğin bakımından sorumlu olanların ibret olsun diye hizmetörleştirilmesinde ısrar ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: "Avamın, Hermesih'in armağanlarına hizmet etme ayinlerine saygısız müdahalelerde bulunduklarını kaydediyorum. Cephaneliğin bakımından sorumlu olanların ibret olsun diye hizmetörleştirilmesinde ısrar ediyorum."

languages.text: "Ich registriere eine sakrilegische Störung der Riten zur Pflege der Gaben des Omnissiah durch die Laienschaft. Ich bestehe auf die vorsorgliche Servitorisierung der für den Aufruhr des Arsenals verantwortlichen Personen."
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: "Ich registriere eine sakrilegische Störung der Riten zur Pflege der Gaben des Omnissiah durch die Laienschaft. Ich bestehe auf die vorsorgliche Servitorisierung der für den Aufruhr des Arsenals verantwortlichen Personen."

languages.text: "私は、信徒による全能の神の贈り物への奉仕の儀式への冒涜的な干渉を登録する。私は、工廠の維持に責任を負う者たちに、注意深く奉仕することを要求する。"
languages.original_text: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."

traits.locale_text: "私は、信徒による全能の神の贈り物への奉仕の儀式への冒涜的な干渉を登録する。私は、工廠の維持に責任を負う者たちに、注意深く奉仕することを要求する。"
